title: Special rules for High Rise Buildings

setback_all_around_m.above_30m_rule: for every 6m (or part) of height above 30m, add 1m, subject to max 20m

notes: Site must abut (or gain access via exclusive passage from) an 18m road; 12m/15m allowed with FSI limits.
CMA high-rise zones per Annexure XIX; elsewhere allowed unless prohibited by Master Plan/DDP.
